candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Wrong section; not current assets.
Balancing/non-current line, not total current assets.
Balancing line and wrong section.
Malformed combined label; not the clean current-assets total.

variables.notes: Selected the clean reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line for cash and cash equivalents.
Non-cash reconciliation item, not cash balance.
Cash flow amount, not ending cash balance on balance sheet.
Cash flow amount, not cash and cash equivalents balance.
Cash flow amount, not cash balance.
Period movement in cash, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not balance-sheet CHE target.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of the period
candidates.why: Ending cash from cash flow statement; useful cross-check but balance sheet is preferred.

candidates.row_label: Exchange rate difference in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX adjustment, not cash balance.
Tax cash outflow, not CHE.
Interest cash outflow, not CHE.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash balance; same label appears twice due to year-to-year layout changes, but it is the same exact row label.

candidates.why: A component of current liabilities, not the total.
Exact match for total current liabilities.
Cash-flow change line, not balance-sheet stock total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Balancing line and wrong maturity bucket.
Wrong maturity bucket.

variables.notes: Selected the clean total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best short-term debt/current maturities line; appears to capture current debt due within one year while excluding lease maturities, consistent with baseline STD.

variables.notes: R:c. Preferred over 'Current interest-bearing liabilities' because that line appears in one version to include lease liabilities, while 'Liabilities Maturing within 1 Year' aligns better with non-lease debt due within one year. Chosen from shortlist.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Best balance-sheet proxy for property, plant and equipment under IFRS; represents net tangible fixed assets.

candidates.row_label: Investment in property, plant, and equipment
candidates.why: Capital expenditure flow, not balance-sheet PPE stock.
Disposal cash flow, not PPE balance.
Intangibles are not PPE.
Intangible-related flow, not PPE stock.

variables.notes: IFRS reporters often use 'Tangible assets' instead of explicit PPE; this is the best reported balance-sheet stock measure.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in working capital and taxes
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working capital and taxes, not the final net operating cash flow.
Best match for net cash flow from operating activities / operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the OANCF shortlist because it is the actual net operating cash flow line, which is superior to the 'before change in working capital and taxes' subtotal.
